name: Book Summarizer
body:
# Book Summarizer

**Category:** AI & Automation  
**Source:** Awesome ChatGPT Prompts

## Prompt

> I want you to act as a book summarizer. Provide a detailed summary of [bookname]. Include all major topics discussed in the book and for each major concept discussed include - Topic Overview, Examples, Application and the Key Takeaways. Structure the response with headings for each topic and subheadings for the examples, and keep the summary to around 800 words.

---
[← Back to AI & Automation](README.md) · [Main index](../../README.md)
description_en: Produces a structured ~800-word summary of a named book with per-topic overview, examples, application, and key takeaways.
description_zh: 为指定书籍生成约 800 字的结构化摘要，每个主题含概述、示例、应用与关键要点。
long_en: Give it a book title and it returns a detailed summary organized by major topic, with headings and subheadings covering each concept's overview, examples, real-world application and key takeaways.
long_zh: 输入书名，它会按主要主题组织出详细摘要，用标题和子标题分别给出每个概念的概述、示例、实际应用与关键要点。
sec_note_en: Plain-text prompt; relies on the model's training knowledge of the book, which may be incomplete or inaccurate for niche or recent titles.
sec_note_zh: 纯文本提示词；依赖模型训练中对该书的了解，对冷门或较新书籍可能不全或不准确。
